column2: Description

Study Type important for QC. 
Case study or Case / Control study --> "Case(/Control)"
Recruitment focused on carrying specific variants (e.g. LRRK2 G2019S cohort)--> "Genetic Enrichment". 
Population based study of healthy volunteers --> "Population Cohort"
Study recruiting prodromals (By any criteria) --> "Prodromal"
Brain Bank --> "Brain Bank"
Recruitment focused on a family history and/or suspected monogenic PD--> "Monogenic"
Sample ID - the ID on the sample label. NEEDS TO BE UNIQUE
Clinical ID of the index case for multiple related individuals from one family. Please leave blank if no related individuals were included in the samples submitted to GP2
The relationship with respect to the family_index
column5: eg. Index, sibling, Father of index, Mother of index, Maternal cousin of index, Paternal cousin of index ect...
